# MixZoo — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> MixZoo is a vibrant and eclectic animal-themed brand featuring a wild and diverse cast of creatures — including a dog, fish, bear, monkey, bat, shark, cat, and wolf. The brand has a playful, adventurous personality with a mix of domestic and wild animals creating a unique and memorable identity. The company is led by CEO Michael Buell and has a dedicated MixZoo team, suggesting an organized business with a strong brand culture built around animal diversity and fun.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app
Explore MixZoo&#39;s vibrant animal kingdom where dogs, bats, and coral reef fish collide. Meet our wild cast and unleash adventure with every click—join the fun today!

### Animal Cast
https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/animal-cast
Discover the MixZoo animal cast: from mysterious types of bats to dazzling coral reef fish and fierce shark fish. Which creature will steal your heart? Dive in now!

### About MixZoo
https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/about
Led by CEO Michael Buell, MixZoo blends domestic charm with wild spirit. Learn how our team brings bats, wolf lore, and reef life into one roaring brand adventure.

### Contact
https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/contact
Got a question about otocinclus catfish care or our shark fish stars? Contact MixZoo now and let our animal-loving crew bring your wildest ideas to life—reach out today!

### Thank You | MixZoo
https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/thank-you
Thank you for contacting MixZoo. Your message has been received and our team will be in touch shortly.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About MixZoo
MixZoo is a vibrant and eclectic animal-themed brand featuring a wild and diverse cast of creatures — including a dog, fish, bear, monkey, bat, shark, cat, and wolf. The brand has a playful, adventurous personality with a mix of domestic and wild animals creating a unique and memorable identity. The company is led by CEO Michael Buell and has a dedicated MixZoo team, suggesting an organized business with a strong brand culture built around animal diversity and fun.

## Target Audience
- Pet lovers and animal enthusiasts
- Pet Enthusiasts
- Family Outing Seekers
- School Educational Groups

## Industry
Pet & Animal Entertainment

- Robots: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
